  {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openchamber/openchamber/issues/comments/4222400272",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/openchamber/openchamber/pull/622#issuecomment-4222400272",

    "id": 4222400272,
    "node_id": "IC_kwDOPt7VTc77rLcQ",
    "user": {
      "login": "conversun",
      "id": 22893221,
      "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyODkzMjIx",
      "avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22893221?v=4",
      "gravatar_id": "",
      "url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun",
      "html_url": "https://github.com/conversun",
      "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/followers",
      "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/following{/other_user}",
      "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/gists{/gist_id}",
      "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/starred{/owner}{/repo}",
      "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/subscriptions",
      "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/orgs",
      "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/repos",
      "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/events{/privacy}",
      "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/conversun/received_events",
      "type": "User",
      "user_view_type": "public",
      "site_admin": false
    },
    "created_at": "2026-04-10T09:02:32Z",
    "updated_at": "2026-04-10T09:02:32Z",
    "body": "Reviewer guide for this PR:\n\nSuggested review order:\n\n1. `packages/ui/src/i18n/index.ts`\n   - i18n bootstrap only\n   - bundled resources, no remote loading\n   - startup initialization path is isolated here\n\n2. `packages/ui/src/stores/useUIStore.ts`\n   - adds persisted `language`\n   - `setLanguage` updates store + calls `i18n.changeLanguage(...)`\n   - this is the only new piece of UI state\n\n3. `packages/ui/src/main.tsx`\n   - wraps the app with `I18nextProvider`\n   - no runtime behavior changes beyond enabling translations\n\n4. Small surface-area consumers:\n   - `packages/ui/src/components/layout/Header.tsx`\n   - `packages/ui/src/components/layout/RightSidebarTabs.tsx`\n   - these are straightforward literal-string -> `t(...)` swaps\n\n5. `packages/ui/src/components/views/SettingsView.tsx`\n   - translates settings navigation/home labels\n   - no settings behavior changes, only display text sources\n\n6. `packages/ui/src/components/sections/openchamber/OpenChamberVisualSettings.tsx`\n   - this is the largest diff because most existing appearance strings live here\n   - the important mechanical change is: static option tables now use `labelKey` / `descriptionKey`\n   - the rest is mostly replacing inline literals with `t(...)` plus adding the language selector UI\n\n7. Locale files:\n   - `packages/ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts`\n   - `packages/ui/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts`\n   - mostly translation data, not control-flow changes\n\nWhat this PR intentionally does *not* do:\n- no server-side i18n\n- no chat content translation\n- no broad UI refactors\n- no theme/styling changes\n\nVerification already run on this branch:\n- `bun run type-check`\n- `bun run lint`\n- `bun run build`\n\nIf helpful, the quickest functional check is:\n1. open Settings → Appearance\n2. switch Language between English and 中文（简体）\n3. verify Header tabs, Settings navigation, and Appearance labels update immediately",
    "author_association": "NONE",
    "reactions": {
      "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openchamber/openchamber/issues/comments/4222400272/reactions",
      "total_count": 0,

      "heart": 0,
      "rocket": 0,
      "eyes": 0
    },
    "performed_via_github_app": null
  },

    "updated_at": "2026-04-10T11:22:27Z",
    "body": "> Reviewer guide for this PR:\r\n> \r\n> Suggested review order:\r\n> \r\n> 1. `packages/ui/src/i18n/index.ts`\r\n>    \r\n>    * i18n bootstrap only\r\n>    * bundled resources, no remote loading\r\n>    * startup initialization path is isolated here\r\n> 2. `packages/ui/src/stores/useUIStore.ts`\r\n>    \r\n>    * adds persisted `language`\r\n>    * `setLanguage` updates store + calls `i18n.changeLanguage(...)`\r\n>    * this is the only new piece of UI state\r\n> 3. `packages/ui/src/main.tsx`\r\n>    \r\n>    * wraps the app with `I18nextProvider`\r\n>    * no runtime behavior changes beyond enabling translations\r\n> 4. Small surface-area consumers:\r\n>    \r\n>    * `packages/ui/src/components/layout/Header.tsx`\r\n>    * `packages/ui/src/components/layout/RightSidebarTabs.tsx`\r\n>    * these are straightforward literal-string -> `t(...)` swaps\r\n> 5. `packages/ui/src/components/views/SettingsView.tsx`\r\n>    \r\n>    * translates settings navigation/home labels\r\n>    * no settings behavior changes, only display text sources\r\n> 6. `packages/ui/src/components/sections/openchamber/OpenChamberVisualSettings.tsx`\r\n>    \r\n>    * this is the largest diff because most existing appearance strings live here\r\n>    * the important mechanical change is: static option tables now use `labelKey` / `descriptionKey`\r\n>    * the rest is mostly replacing inline literals with `t(...)` plus adding the language selector UI\r\n> 7. Locale files:\r\n>    \r\n>    * `packages/ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts`\r\n>    * `packages/ui/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts`\r\n>    * mostly translation data, not control-flow changes\r\n> \r\n> What this PR intentionally does _not_ do:\r\n> \r\n> * no server-side i18n\r\n> * no chat content translation\r\n> * no broad UI refactors\r\n> * no theme/styling changes\r\n> \r\n> Verification already run on this branch:\r\n> \r\n> * `bun run type-check`\r\n> * `bun run lint`\r\n> * `bun run build`\r\n> \r\n> If helpful, the quickest functional check is:\r\n> \r\n> 1. open Settings → Appearance\r\n> 2. switch Language between English and 中文（简体）\r\n> 3. verify Header tabs, Settings navigation, and Appearance labels update immediately\r\n\r\n@btriapitsyn ",
